name: 1724 SEVENTEEN Tonic Water 0,2l
description: Contemporary Alchemy combines science and intuition to discover the best flavors in the mixer category through modern techniques, infusions and extracts. This 1724 Seventeen Tonic Water impresses with its fine perlage and mildness, accompanied by clear citrus aromas and a subtle bitter note. Its story begins precisely at 1724 meters above sea level on the ancient Inca Trail in the Peruvian Andes, where quinine was discovered hundreds of years ago. The quinine is still harvested by hand there today under perfect conditions, at exactly this altitude and in exactly this place, in accordance with ancient tradition. The indigenous Quechua people used the bark of the cinchona tree for its healing properties and balanced out the bitterness with sweetened water. This tradition is being continued. Together with hand-picked fruit from Spain and the clear water of the Andes, this creates the unique 1724 Tonic Water, whose character is deeply rooted in the culture and tradition of this region. Awards: - 89/100 points at Falstaff Spirits Special 2022 (automated translation) Tasting notes: Color: Clear. Nose: Fresh with citrus fruits. Taste: Fine bubbles, slightly bitter, citrus fruits. name: Doppio Passo Bianco Alternativa alkoholfrei 0,75l
description: Doppio Passo Bianco Alternativa non-alcoholic is a high-quality non-alcoholic wine-based drink that combines Mediterranean freshness with contemporary non-alcoholic wine enjoyment. The bottling is produced in Germany, but its style is clearly based on the southern Italian white wine tradition for which Doppio Passo is internationally renowned. It is based on a classically vinified white wine made from a southern Italian white grape variety, which is only de-alcoholized after complete fermentation. This preserves the wine's typical character with its balance and structure and clearly sets it apart from simple grape juice products. Dealcoholization is carried out using the particularly precise centrifugal cone column process, which is used specifically for the production of high-quality alcohol-free wine alternatives. First, the volatile aroma components are gently separated, then the alcohol is removed and the aromas are returned. This process makes it possible to preserve freshness, harmony and depth of aroma without using alcohol. The Doppio Passo Bianco Alternativa Alcohol-Free is therefore aimed at connoisseurs looking for an alcohol-free white wine alternative with an authentic wine profile. Bottled in the classic 0.75 l bottle, this bottling is ideal for conscious moments of enjoyment, gastronomy and versatile food accompaniment. name: Heinrich Verjus Rosé 0,75l
description: Der Heinrich Verjus Rosé ist eine elegante, alkoholfreie Spezialität, die neue Genussräume eröffnet und sich bewusst jenseits klassischer Wein- oder Schaumweinstilistiken bewegt. Verjus, abgeleitet vom französischen vert jus für "grüner Saft", wird aus unreifen Trauben gewonnen und zeichnet sich durch seine mild-säuerliche, erfrischende Charakteristik ohne Alkohol aus. Die Rosé-Variante des Hauses Heinrich präsentiert sich besonders fein, rund und ausgewogen und eignet sich ideal für genussvolle Momente zu jeder Jahreszeit. Hergestellt aus handgelesenen, zart umgefärbten Blaufränkisch-Trauben, bleibt dieser Verjus vollkommen naturbelassen, ohne Zuckerzusatz und ohne Alkohol. Der Heinrich Verjus Rosé ist ungefiltert, wodurch alle natürlichen Bestandteile der Trauben erhalten bleiben. Trubstoffe können sich daher am Flaschenboden absetzen und sind ein Zeichen der schonenden Verarbeitung. Ein sanftes Schütteln vor dem Öffnen wird empfohlen, um die volle Aromatik wieder harmonisch zu verbinden. Diese alkoholfreie Alternative überzeugt durch ihre Frische, Lebendigkeit und Vielseitigkeit und richtet sich an Genießer, die bewussten, anspruchsvollen Geschmack suchen, ohne auf Tiefe und Eleganz zu verzichten. Tasting notes: Im Glas zartes Rosé mit natürlicher Trübung. In der Nase frisch und feinfruchtig mit eleganter Traubenaromatik. Am Gaumen mild säuerlich ausgewogen mit runder Textur und lebendiger Frische. Der Abgang ist klar animierend und erfrischend. Der Heinrich Verjus Rosé eignet sich hervorragend pur auf Eis als alkoholfreier Aperitif mit eleganter Frische. Besonders spannend zeigt er sich als spritzige Basis für kreative Drinks, etwa kombiniert mit Tonic Water, frischen Kräutern oder Zitruszesten. Darüber hinaus ist dieser Verjus aus Blaufränkisch-Trauben ein vielseitiger Begleiter in der Küche und ideal zum Verfeinern von Salaten, Fischgerichten oder Desserts, bei denen eine feine, nicht dominante Säure gefragt ist. Auch in der modernen alkoholfreien Genusskultur überzeugt er durch Vielseitigkeit, Natürlichkeit und hohen Anspruch.

name: Siegfried WONDERLEAF alkoholfrei 0,5l
description: Siegfried Wonderleaf non-alcoholic is the high-quality alternative for anyone who loves the aromatic diversity of a classic gin profile but wants to consciously avoid alcohol. Developed by Rheinland Distillers in Bonn, this alcohol-free botanical spirit is based on the recipe of the award-winning Siegfried Rheinland Dry Gin. Using traditional craftsmanship, 18 selected botanicals are used to create a multi-layered interplay of aromas that is particularly suitable for cocktails and long drinks. The composition is based on natural ingredients such as lime blossom, juniper, thyme, cardamom, ginger, angelica root and lavender, creating a floral, spicy and fresh, citrusy profile - completely sugar-free and naturally alcohol-free. Stylistically, however, it remains close to the aromatic character of the original and presents itself as a modern interpretation of botanical diversity. Wonderleaf is not intended to be enjoyed neat, but was created especially for mixed drinks and is regarded as the first German alcohol-free alternative in the gin style. With great attention to detail, it builds on the successful series of its creators, who have won several international awards with their "Siggi". (automated translation) Tasting notes: Color: Clear. Siegfried Wonderleaf non-alcoholic is ideal for non-alcoholic drinks such as Wonderleaf & Tonic (ideal in a ratio of 1:3), Virgin Collins, Botanical Highballs or fresh citrus spritz variations. In culinary terms, it harmonizes particularly well with Asian starters, light Mediterranean cuisine, summer rolls, grilled vegetables, fresh herb salads, but also with goat's cheese, crostini, orange dips and light desserts such as lemon sorbet or yoghurt and berry compositions. name: Tement Süd Steirischer Verjus Rosso 0,74l
description: The Tement Süd Styrian Verjus Rosso 0.74 l is a unique, non-alcoholic natural product from the renowned region of Southern Styria, which is produced by hand using traditional methods. The term verjus (French for "green juice") refers to the juice of unripe grapes, which impresses with its fine acidity and natural freshness. The Rosso version is made exclusively from carefully selected red grape varieties, which not only give the Verjus its delicate ruby red color, but also a subtle, fruity aroma. The grapes come from the Tement family's own organically cultivated vineyards, which thrive on the calcareous and loamy coralline limestone soils of southern Styria. This special soil structure gives the product a fine minerality and aromatic depth.
